ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxa" (
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the taxon */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the taxon */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Typical habitat of the species */,
  "taxon_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the taxon */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the taxon */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the taxon class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxa_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES taxon_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "subject_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject taxon involved in the interaction */,
  "target_taxon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target taxon involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., eats, eatenBy) */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was observed */,
  "interaction_location" TEXT /* Location where the interaction was observed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_target_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interactions_subject_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data steward, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecosystems" (
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem */,
  "ecosystem_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecosystem */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the ecosystem */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., forest, desert) */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the ecosystem */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "lead_researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead researcher */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_lead_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_researcher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the interaction was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the interaction */,
  "entry_method" TEXT /* Method used to record the data */,
  "entry_location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecosystem where the data was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_entry_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_location_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conservation status record */,
  "taxon_id" INTEGER /* Taxon ID associated with the status */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status (e.g., endangered, vulnerable) */,
  "population_trend" TEXT /* Population trend (e.g., increasing, declining) */,
  "last_assessment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last conservation status assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_status_taxon_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxon_id") REFERENCES taxa ("taxon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_status_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "interaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  "interaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the interaction (e.g., trophic, behavioral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxon_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxon class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxon class (e.g., Insecta, Aves) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxon class */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent taxon class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxon_classes_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES taxon_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecosystem_interactions" (
  "ecosystem_interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem interaction record */,
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ecosystem where the interaction occurs */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interaction being recorded */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the interaction in the ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecosystem_interactions_ecosystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecosystem_interactions_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES interactions ("interaction_id")
)
